panels.text: The forest animals remember their names! The fog is lifting!
Totoro dances with joy! More of the forest is visible now!
The museum map is fixed! All the places are labeled again!
The forest path to the museum is clear now!
The clocks are working and the stories make sense again!
Totoro nods happily. The past is remembered!
The animals know what they like! The pronouns are fixed!
Almost there! One more Trail to go!
The Forest Museum is completely restored!
All the fog has cleared! The animals are free!
Totoro jumps for joy! You saved the Forest Museum!
The forest spirits remember their families!
The feast preparations can begin!
The shopping is done! The table is set!
The kitchen smells amazing!
The plans are ready! Everyone is being so polite!
The feast is almost ready!
Past and present make sense! The recipes are found!
One more Trail and the feast will begin!
The feast is served! Everyone sits down to eat!
The spirits say thank you! The food is delicious!
Totoro eats happily! You saved the Feast!
The morning routine is fixed! The Catbus is on time!
The city is waking up! Time for the tour!
The street signs are fixed! All the buildings have names!
The Catbus route is clear!
Everyone has their things back! No more mix-ups!
The city looks more beautiful than ever!
The sentences are fixed! The calendar is correct!
One last challenge and the city is saved!
The city tour is complete! Every sign is in place!
The Catbus purrs happily! The route is perfect!
Totoro, the Soot Sprites, and the Catbus celebrate!
You saved the entire forest! You are Totoro's best friend!
The Forest Museum is shining bright!
All the creatures are back to normal!
Totoro opens the path to a new area...
Realm 1 Complete! The Feast awaits!
The feast was wonderful! The spirits are full and happy!
Totoro leads you to the city...
A new adventure begins!
Realm 2 Complete! The Catbus is waiting!
The city is saved! Every building, sign, and schedule is perfect!
Uncle Michael can enjoy his visit now!
The whole forest is restored! No more fog!
Congratulations! You completed Totoro's Forest Academy!
Totoro will always be your friend. Come back any time!
